title: Kashmir
album: Rolling Stone Magazine's 500 Greatest Songs Of All Time
why_this_song: Kashmir by Led Zeppelin (1975) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "No, yeah, mama, there ain't no denying"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "With stars to fill my dreams"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, baby, I've been flying"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Oh, baby, I've been flying"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "there" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fill" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fill" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With stars to fill my dreams
Oh, all I see turns to brown

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: To be where I have been
My Shangri-La beneath the summer Moon

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Kashmir" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Kashmir" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
